hero.name: TAUFIK MAULANA, S.Kom.
hero.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
hero.description: A results-driven Web Developer and Full-Stack Developer with comprehensive experience in designing, developing, and deploying robust enterprise-scale web applications. Highly proficient in building heavy backend architecture using Laravel, integrating enterprise SAP APIs, and modernizing frontends using Vue.js, React.js, and Tailwind CSS.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.bio: I am a professional web developer with a demonstrated track record of delivering high-stakes core systems for national transportation infrastructure under strict deployment timelines. Possessing strong technical problem-solving capabilities and a collaborative mindset tailored for high-pressure, agile team environments.
